title: Framework webhook payload operation_id bridge
problem: The SDK beta17 decisioning framework auto-emits webhook payloads without top-level operation_id even though mcp-webhook-payload.json requires it.
localBehavior: Wrap the framework taskWebhookEmitter for the training-agent tenants and inject a payload operation_id before delegating to the signed SDK webhook emitter.
removalCondition: Remove when the SDK framework threads push_notification_config.operation_id into auto-emitted webhook payloads or otherwise includes a schema-valid payload operation_id directly.

title: Staged SDK schema bundle cache copy
problem: The 3.0 compatibility storyboard lane needs the archived 3.0.x schema bundle available under the SDK schemas-data cache key used by the runner.
localBehavior: Copy a repo-built or archived dist/schemas/<version> tree into node_modules/@adcp/sdk/dist/lib/schemas-data/<bundle-key> before running compatibility storyboards.
removalCondition: Remove when the compatibility lane passes the archived schema root through public SDK schemaRoot options instead of staging it into node_modules.

title: Current-source compliance and schema overlay into SDK cache
problem: The SDK package ships a snapshot of compliance bundles, schema bundles, and generated validators. Current PR storyboard runs need to grade current repo source before a new SDK package exists.
localBehavior: Build current compliance/schema bundles, copy them into the SDK cache, and patch generated validator enum literals for same-PR comply_test_controller additions.
removalCondition: Remove when the storyboard matrix passes current compliance and schema roots through public SDK options instead of overlaying the SDK cache.
